testcase.name: Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Student Authentication Redirects › should save intended destination and redirect after login
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Student Authentication Redirects › should show return URL display on login page
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Student Authentication Redirects › should handle multiple redirect attempts correctly
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Lecturer Authentication Redirects › should save intended destination and redirect after login
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Lecturer Authentication Redirects › should show return URL display on lecturer login page
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Cross-Role Redirects › should redirect to correct login based on route
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Session Storage Persistence › should persist redirect data across page reloads
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Session Storage Persistence › should expire redirect data after 30 minutes
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Edge Cases › should not save login pages as intended destinations
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Edge Cases › should handle malformed redirect data gracefully
Authentication Redirect Integration Tests › Default Redirects › should redirect to role-based default when no intended destination
Barcode Scanning Feature › Scanner Access & Setup › should access barcode scanner from dashboard
Barcode Scanning Feature › Scanner Access & Setup › should request camera permissions when opening scanner
Barcode Scanning Feature › Barcode Detection › should handle successful barcode scan
Barcode Scanning Feature › Barcode Detection › should handle invalid barcode scan
Barcode Scanning Feature › Barcode Detection › should handle duplicate scans
Barcode Scanning Feature › Session Management › should require active session for scanning
Barcode Scanning Feature › Session Management › should work with active session
Barcode Scanning Feature › Camera Integration › should handle camera permission denial
Barcode Scanning Feature › Camera Integration › should handle camera errors gracefully
Barcode Scanning Feature › Manual Entry Fallback › should provide manual entry option
Barcode Scanning Feature › Real-time Updates › should update roster in real-time
Barcode Scanning Feature › Error Handling › should handle network errors during scan
Barcode Scanning Feature › Error Handling › should handle malformed barcode data
Barcode Scanning Feature › Mobile Experience › should work on mobile devices
Barcode Scanning Feature › Mobile Experience › should handle mobile camera properly
